of CMS Star Ratings for MA plans.
HEDIS data are released as a set of two files per year:
- File 1: HEDIS Measures File (does not include Plan All-Cause Readmission measures)
- File 2: Plan All-Cause Readmissions File
HEDIS data are released based on the measurement year of the plan data submission, which reflect health care delivered in that calendar year. Other HEDIS reports may distinguish between measurement year and submission year. Care should be taken to confirm that the correct years
